name: Transformer
description: Electrical transformer asset including ratings, location, installation date, and maintenance history.

name: Pole
description: Distribution pole asset including material, height, condition, and attached equipment.

name: Cable Segment
description: Underground or aerial cable segment connecting network nodes.

name: Substation
description: Substation asset including transformers, switchgear, protection relays, and SCADA connectivity.

name: Account
description: Customer account including billing details, tariff assignment, and payment history.

name: Premise
description: Physical premise address, connection point, and metering configuration.

name: Meter
description: Electricity meter device including type, serial number, and installation details.

name: Service Request
description: Customer service request such as new connection, fault report, or billing inquiry.

name: General Ledger Account
description: General ledger chart of accounts for financial reporting and regulatory compliance.

name: Invoice
description: Customer invoice including charges, taxes, and payment status.

name: Cost Centre
description: Cost centre structure for budgeting and expense allocation across business units.

name: Employee Record
description: Employee personal details, employment history, and organisational assignment.

name: Payroll Entry
description: Monthly payroll record including salary, deductions, and bank transfer details.

name: Organisational Structure
description: Organisational hierarchy including reporting lines and position assignments.

name: Feeder
description: Primary distribution feeder including voltage level, capacity, and connected substations.

name: Substation Node
description: Topological node in the network model representing a substation connection point.

name: Sectionaliser
description: Network sectionalising device used for fault isolation and supply restoration.

name: Meter Read
description: Interval meter reading data including timestamp, consumption, and quality flags.

name: Consumption Profile
description: Aggregated customer consumption patterns used for load forecasting and network planning.

name: Material Stock Item
description: Inventory item including stock code, description, unit of measure, and current stock level.

name: Purchase Order
description: Purchase order for materials including line items, quantities, and delivery schedule.

name: Inventory Transaction
description: Inventory movement record for receipts, issues, transfers, and adjustments.

name: Incident Report
description: Detailed record of network incidents including fault type, location, severity, timestamp, and resolution status.

name: Outage Event
description: Record of unplanned power outages including affected area, customer count, duration, and root cause analysis.

name: Weather Observation
description: Real-time weather data from monitoring stations including temperature, wind speed, precipitation, and lightning strikes.

name: Weather Forecast
description: Forecasted weather conditions including temperature ranges, severe weather warnings, and probability of precipitation.
